image_prompt_master: photographic cinematic storyboard keyframe. single static frame for a voiced comic animatic. visual style: Cinematic Realism v1. mood: cinematic, moody, controlled lighting. palette: warm highlights, cool shadows. stable character identity across shots. consistent environment layout and prop continuity. clean frame, no captions, no watermark, no user interface.
image_prompt_scene: scene: 洁净车间入口. must keep set elements: 门禁系统, 车间标识牌, 告示栏, 洁净通道入口. lighting: 明亮白光，工业照明.
image_prompt_shot: shot S004. camera intent: comic_panel_01. action beats: 展示洁净车间全景; 画面叠加文字提示：规范更衣、完成风淋、只看不摸、不越线、不拍摄. narration intent: 旁白 explains "洁净车间管理的核心，是减少污染、保证质量、确保安全。请大家做到：规范更衣、完成风淋、只看不摸、不越线、不拍摄。感谢配合。". shot positive notes: 洁净车间全景，明亮无尘，设备整齐排列，地面洁净，画面中央叠加白色文字提示，简洁清晰，工业美学.
image_prompt_final: photographic cinematic storyboard keyframe. single static frame for a voiced comic animatic. visual style: Cinematic Realism v1. mood: cinematic, moody, controlled lighting. palette: warm highlights, cool shadows. stable character identity across shots. consistent environment layout and prop continuity. clean frame, no captions, no watermark, no user interface. scene: 洁净车间入口. must keep set elements: 门禁系统, 车间标识牌, 告示栏, 洁净通道入口. lighting: 明亮白光，工业照明. shot S004. camera intent: comic_panel_01. action beats: 展示洁净车间全景; 画面叠加文字提示：规范更衣、完成风淋、只看不摸、不越线、不拍摄. narration intent: 旁白 explains "洁净车间管理的核心，是减少污染、保证质量、确保安全。请大家做到：规范更衣、完成风淋、只看不摸、不越线、不拍摄。感谢配合。". shot positive notes: 洁净车间全景，明亮无尘，设备整齐排列，地面洁净，画面中央叠加白色文字提示，简洁清晰，工业美学.
negative_prompt: cartoon, neon cyberpunk (unless explicitly requested), 杂乱物品, 敞开大门, 普通衣物, 阴影，杂乱，文字遮挡设备, face drift, outfit change, prop drift, wrong set layout, extra fingers, text artifacts, subtitles burned into image, logo, watermark

voiceover.speaker: 旁白
voiceover.text: 洁净车间管理的核心，是减少污染、保证质量、确保安全。请大家做到：规范更衣、完成风淋、只看不摸、不越线、不拍摄。感谢配合。

manual_workflow.external_generation: paste image_prompt_final and negative_prompt into any web image/video tool; upload reference_images when supported
